summary.currentSprint: Debug blockers and MVP flow stabilisation
summary.nextObjective: Verify Splash to Onboarding to Home to Training to Results end-to-end

screens.name: Splash
screens.subtitle: Academy Entrance landing page.
done: Hero now uses stable SVG asset path
screens.review: Splash blocker fixes are applied. Remaining work is device verification after GitHub Pages deploys.

screens.name: Onboarding
screens.subtitle: Lock-step name, position, confirmation flow.
done: Wizard split into Step 1, Step 2, Step 3
Confirmation and Enter Academy step exists
todo: Confirm CTA visibility on all iPhone sizes
Verify selected position text displays correctly
Verify Home remains locked until onboarding complete
screens.review: Onboarding architecture is stable. This now needs regression testing, not redesign.

screens.name: Home
screens.subtitle: Main player dashboard.
screens.review: Home is next after blocker verification.

screens.name: Training
screens.subtitle: Training flow and drills.
screens.review: Training is the product value. Keep it simple before adding sensors.

screens.name: Results
screens.subtitle: Progress and results view.
screens.review: Results should show improvement without becoming an advanced analytics suite.

screens.name: Player
screens.subtitle: Player identity and settings.
screens.review: Player supports the loop but is not the main MVP value.
